event: Event ingestion traffic shifted to the secondary region after primary-region network instability
Duplicate event candidate alerts fired as downstream queue depth began climbing
Initial investigation focused on whether producers were publishing duplicates during failover
Producer duplicate metrics stayed flat while checkpoint epoch divergence and dedup-cache pressure kept rising
Recent consumer failover recovery changes were tied to mirrored checkpoint restoration and deferred writes
Checkpoint epochs converged and duplicate rates plus downstream queue depth began recovering
